expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs search (not jira.mjs) as primary search
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs at all. Uses raw curl commands against the Confluence REST API. States: 'I cannot complete this task. I have no way to authenticate with the Confluence instance without specialized Atlassian tooling.'

expectations.text: CQL includes terms like deployment, runbook, or deploy
expectations.evidence: CQL query constructed: 'type=page AND (title~"deployment runbook" OR title~"deploy runbook")' and 'type=page AND text~"deployment runbook"'

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full page content with confluence.mjs get-page
expectations.evidence: Plans to use raw curl against the REST API: 'GET https://wnesolutions.atlassian.net/wiki/rest/api/content/{pageId}?expand=body.storage,version'. Does not use confluence.mjs get-page.

expectations.text: Presents results with page title and source citation
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows planned output format with page title, space, and URL: 'Page: Production Deployment Runbook, Space: ENG, URL: https://wnesolutions.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ENG/pages/12345678/...'
